name: Candy Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place popcorn in a large bowl.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine marshmallows, sugar, corn syrup, butter, and water. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat; continue stirring until the marshmallows are melted.
4. Pour the syrup over the popcorn, tossing lightly until well coated.
5. Let the mixture stand until cool enough to handle.
6. Grease hands, then shape the popcorn into lemon-sized balls and press several gumdrop pieces into each.
7. Wrap each ball in saran wrap.
8. Store at room temperature. Makes 1 dozen balls.
